subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the divine Lote-Tree! Praise be to God that the outpourings of the Most Glorious Kingdom from all [3.5s]... ...In cycles gone by, though harmony was established, yet, owing to the absence of means, the unity of all mankind could not have been achieved
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره الالهیه الحمد لله که فیوضات ملکوت ابهی از جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
